odule (redirected from Version1.Gdp ) The GDP is no longer supported by the Accessors Framework. This page exists as a historical reference. https://gdp.cs.berkeley.edu/redmine/ describes the The Global Data Plane (GDP): "The GDP is a middleware tha

bal Data Plane (GDP): "The GDP is a middleware that provides a data-centric glue for swarm applications. The basic primitive is that of a secure single-writer append-only log stored on potentially untrusted distributed infrastructure. Logs natively s

rusted distributed infrastructure. Logs natively support a publish-subscribe mode, making GDP a communication tool. At the same time, data in a GDP log can be stored for long-term in a fault-tolerant manner, thus making it an ideal tool for data-stor

manner, thus making it an ideal tool for data-storage." To use the GDP Acessors, you must have certain packages installed on your local machine. The best way to do that is to run the script: accessors/web/gdp/adm/gdp-setup.sh The idea is to use the G

/web/gdp/adm/gdp-setup.sh The idea is to use the GDP Java interface to insulate accessor development from changes to the GDP wire protocol. An alternative would be to write a GDP JavaScript Interface that uses the GDP wire protocol. Cape Code and th

that uses the GDP wire protocol. Cape Code and the GDP $PTII/lib/gdp-X.Y-Z.jar - The Java/GDP interface jar file, which is included in the classpath by running (cd $PTII; ./configure) GDP Java Interface -> Update Ptolemy $PTII/ptolemy/actor/lib/jjs/

ace -> Update Ptolemy $PTII/ptolemy/actor/lib/jjs/modules/gdp - The Cape Code Host implementation of the gdp accessor module. GDPHelper (JavaDoc) - Downloads and builds the gdp. Tests $PTII/ptolemy/actor/lib/jjs/modules/gdp/test/GDPManager.tcl - Down

tor/lib/jjs/modules/gdp/test/GDPManager.tcl - Downloads and build the GDP, starts up the daemons and creates a few logs $PTII/ptolemy/actor/lib/jjs/modules/gdp/test/ | $PTII/ptolemy/actor/lib/jjs/modules/gdp/test/auto - Ptolemy models that test the G

les/gdp/test/auto - Ptolemy models that test the GDP. To run these tests, install Ptolemy II , install the gdp libraries by running gdp/adm/gdp-setup.sh and then run $PTII/bin/capecode ptolemy/actor/lib/jjs/modules/gdp/test/auto/*.xml http://terra.e

lib/jjs/modules/gdp/test/auto/*.xml http://terra.eecs.berkeley.edu:8080/job/ptII/ - The PtII Jenkins nightly build which runs the above tests GDPTestGenerator - a model that is deployed on terra that generates regular test data. Node.js and the GDP G
